title: Fetch not available in n8n Code node
symptom: When trying to use the fetch function in a Code node, n8n throws 'fetch is not defined'. This prevents the workflow from executing as expected.
applies_when: Attempting to call an external API
not_this_if: Using the HTTP Request node instead
root_cause: The Code node in n8n does not run in a browser environment where the fetch API is available. As a result, attempts to use fetch will lead to an error since it is not defined in the Node.js environment that n8n operates in.
fix_steps: Replace the fetch call with this.helpers.httpRequest
Use the appropriate method and URL in the httpRequest call
Return the response in the expected format
agent_instruction: Use this.helpers.httpRequest instead of fetch to call external APIs in the Code node.
